name: Italian Sausage Pizzaiola Bill Lawrie Rggw25a
recipeIngredient: 6 Plum tomatoes, cut into 1/4 inch slices
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage slowly, rendering as much grease as possible.
2. Submerge the sausage in boiling water for 10-15 seconds to allow more grease to float away.
3. Sauté mushrooms, onions, red pepper, artichoke hearts, olives, and garlic in olive oil until crisp-tender, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes, Italian seasoning, basil, and sausage. Reduce heat and simmer until the right consistency is reached.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cut tops off rolls and hollow them out. Place in a preheated oven at 350°F for a few minutes until crusts are crisp.
7. Fill each roll with the sausage/vegetable mixture.
8. Sprinkle Romano cheese on top of each roll and place under broiler just until the cheese starts to melt.
9. Serve alongside a green salad with Italian dressing and a glass of Bardolino or Chianti. If making your own Italian dressing, save the artichoke marinade to mix into the dressing. Serves 4. Enjoy.
